page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tutorial aims to illustrate the process of setting up a simulation system containing a protein, step by step, using the BioExcel Building Blocks library (biobb). The particular example used is the Lysozyme protein (PDB code 1AKI).
page_metadata.bioschemas__name: BioExcel Building Blocks tutorials: Protein MD Setup (Gromacs Version)
